summary: Iteration 56 - My Harvests API & Unit Conversion Testing. 17/17 backend tests passed (100%). All core features working: GET /api/greenlink/harvests/my-harvests returns harvests with stats, filtering by statut works, unit conversion (tonnes→kg x1000, sacs→kg x65) is correct, quantity_display format includes original unit.

minor.issue: Stats are computed from filtered harvests only, not ALL harvests. When filtering by statut=en_attente, stats show only en_attente counts. Main agent note indicated stats should reflect ALL harvests regardless of filter.
minor.current_behavior: stats.total=8 when filtering en_attente (only filtered count)
minor.expected_behavior: stats should show total=12 (all harvests) even when filtering

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix stats calculation in GET /api/greenlink/harvests/my-harvests to show ALL harvests stats even when filter is applied (line 218-231 in greenlink.py)
critical_code_review_comments: Unit conversion logic is correct: tonnes x1000, sacs x65, kg unchanged
quantity_display format is correct: '2 tonne(s) (2000 kg)', '3 sac(s) (195 kg)', '500 kg'
original_quantity field correctly stores pre-conversion value
Stats calculation works but only for filtered results (see minor issue)
Filtering by statut (en_attente, validee, rejetee) works correctly
Email notification helper correctly passes original_quantity and unit to email service
send_harvest_notification_email correctly formats quantity_str with unit labels

success_rate.frontend: N/A (mobile app - not testable in browser)

seed_data_creation: Created 6 test harvests (2 each for tonnes, sacs, kg units) with notes prefixed 'TEST_'
context_for_next_testing_agent: My-harvests endpoint fully functional. Farmer has 12 total harvests (10 en_attente, 2 validee). Unit conversion verified: tonnes x1000, sacs x65. Test data created with notes containing 'TEST_' prefix. Minor issue: stats are computed from filtered results only, not all harvests.
